title: Simply Beautiful
description: Improve your playthrough with this modpack.
body:
The Simply Beautiful modpack aims to provide a base of the best performance mods and Quality of Life features.

**📥 Installation Guide**
****
**Installation (Modrinth App)**

1. Download and install the Modrinth app
2. Login with your Minecraft account
3. Select "Browse" on the Left side
4. Search for "Simply Beautiful"
5. Select and download it.

**🎯 Goals**
****
**OptiFine Features**

Simply Beautiful supports most OptiFine features including shaders, connected textures and zoom. If your resource pack states "OptiFine required," it will probably function here as well.

**Compatibility**
****
**Built on Fabric**

Simply Beautiful uses the Fabric mod loader, which is lightweight, fast, and supports a lot of mods.

**Compatibility**

Simply Beautiful is for versions 1.20.1+ and has been tested with the Modrinth App and ATLauncher.

It's always advised to use the latest version of Simply Beautifulto get the best experience.

<details>
<summary>Other notes</summary>
This modpack is not related to Simply Optimized.

Also check out [https://modrinth.com/modpack/sop](https://modrinth.com/modpack/sop) if you only want performance
</details>
